member.name: T:Ubiquitus.App
member.summary: Represents the main application class for the Ubiquitus WPF application. Handles application-level events and initialization.
member.remarks: This class serves as the entry point for the WPF application and manages the application lifecycle, including startup, shutdown, and unhandled exception handling.
member.summary: App

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.App.OnStartup(System.Windows.StartupEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises the event. Displays the splash screen before showing the main window.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.App.Main
member.summary: Application Entry Point.

member.name: T:Ubiquitus.MainWindow
member.summary: Represents the main window of the Ubiquitus application. Provides the primary user interface for interacting with the game engine.
member.remarks: This window serves as the main container for the application's UI elements and handles user interactions, game display, and command input.
member.summary: MainWindow

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Sets up the window components and initializes the UI.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.InitializeGame
member.summary: Initializes the game engine and creates a sample game world

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.CreateSampleWorld
member.summary: Creates a sample game world for demonstration
member.returns: Tuple containing rooms dictionary, items dictionary, and starting room ID

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.OnGameOutput(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Handles output generated by the game engine

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.SendButton_Click(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the Send button click event

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.CommandInput_KeyDown(System.Object,System.Windows.Input.KeyEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the Enter key press in the command input

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.ProcessCommand
member.summary: Processes the command entered by the user

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:Ubiquitus.SplashWindow
member.summary: Represents the splash screen window displayed during application startup. Shows the application logo and version information.
member.remarks: The splash screen automatically closes after a set duration or when clicked by the user. Version information is retrieved from the assembly attributes.
member.summary: SplashWindow

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.SplashWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Sets up the splash screen with version information and auto-close timer.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.SplashWindow.SetVersionNumber
member.summary: Sets the version number text from the assembly version.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.SplashWindow.Timer_Tick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the timer tick event to close the splash screen automatically.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.SplashWindow.Window_MouseDown(System.Object,System.Windows.Input.MouseButtonEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles mouse down events to allow users to close the splash screen by clicking.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.SplashWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TextGame.GameEngine
member.summary: Core game engine for text-based adventure games.

member.name: E:TextGame.GameEngine.OutputGenerated
member.summary: Event raised when the game outputs text to the player.

member.name: P:TextGame.GameEngine.Player
member.summary: Gets the current player state.

member.name: P:TextGame.GameEngine.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the game is currently running.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.Initialize(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,TextGame.Room},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,TextGame.Item},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the game with rooms and items.
member.param: Dictionary of rooms in the game world.
Dictionary of items in the game world.
The ID of the room where the player starts.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.ProcessCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Processes a player command.
member.param: The command string entered by the player.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.HandleMove(System.String)
member.summary: Handles player movement between rooms.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.DisplayRoom
member.summary: Displays the current room's description.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.ExamineItem(System.String)
member.summary: Examines an item in the current room or inventory.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.TakeItem(System.String)
member.summary: Takes an item from the current room.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.DropItem(System.String)
member.summary: Drops an item from inventory into the current room.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.UseItem(System.String)
member.summary: Uses an item from the player's inventory.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.ShowInventory
member.summary: Shows the player's inventory.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.ShowHelp
member.summary: Shows the help text with available commands.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.GetCurrentRoom
member.summary: Gets the current room the player is in.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.FindItemByName(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Finds an item by name from a list of item IDs.

member.name: M:TextGame.GameEngine.Output(System.String)
member.summary: Outputs text to the player through the OutputGenerated event.

member.name: T:TextGame.Item
member.summary: Represents an item that can be collected, used, or examined in the game.

member.name: P:TextGame.Item.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this item.

member.name: P:TextGame.Item.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the item.

member.name: P:TextGame.Item.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description shown when the item is examined.

member.name: P:TextGame.Item.IsCollectable
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this item can be picked up by the player.

member.name: P:TextGame.Item.IsUsable
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this item can be used.

member.name: T:TextGame.Player
member.summary: Represents the player's inventory and state.

member.name: P:TextGame.Player.CurrentRoomId
member.summary: Gets or sets the player's current location (room ID).

member.name: P:TextGame.Player.Inventory
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of item IDs in the player's inventory.

member.name: P:TextGame.Player.Score
member.summary: Gets or sets the player's score.

member.name: P:TextGame.Player.MoveCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of moves the player has made.

member.name: M:TextGame.Player.AddItem(System.String)
member.summary: Adds an item to the player's inventory.
member.param: The ID of the item to add.

member.name: M:TextGame.Player.RemoveItem(System.String)
member.summary: Removes an item from the player's inventory.
member.param: The ID of the item to remove.
member.returns: True if the item was removed, false if it wasn't in inventory.

member.name: M:TextGame.Player.HasItem(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the player has a specific item in their inventory.
member.param: The ID of the item to check for.
member.returns: True if the item is in inventory, false otherwise.

member.name: T:TextGame.Room
member.summary: Represents a location in the text adventure game.

member.name: P:TextGame.Room.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this room.

member.name: P:TextGame.Room.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the room.

member.name: P:TextGame.Room.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the room.

member.name: P:TextGame.Room.Exits
member.summary: Gets or sets the available exits from this room. Key: Direction (e.g., "north", "south", "east", "west") Value: Room ID to connect to

member.name: P:TextGame.Room.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the items present in this room.

member.name: P:TextGame.Room.IsVisited
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this room has been visited.
